name: Cornerstone Christian Fellowship
description: Come play pickleball at Cornerstone Christian Fellowship in Lewisburg, PA! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Lewisburg YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Lewisburg YMCA in Lewisburg, PA! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Members only — Monthly membership plus daily fee to play
